mapper.sql: id, source_code, name, source_type, content_profile, status, visibility, default_sync_mode, config_json::text as config_json, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, latest_manifest_hash, last_sync_run_id, last_sync_status, last_sync_at, created_at, updated_at

sql.if: and ( source_code ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or name ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select: select from knowledge_sources order by id desc
select count(*) from knowledge_sources where source_code <> 'legacy-default'

select from knowledge_sources where source_code <> 'legacy-default'
order by updated_at desc, id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}

insert into knowledge_sources ( source_code, name, source_type, content_profile, status, visibility, default_sync_mode, config_json, metadata_json, latest_manifest_hash, last_sync_run_id, last_sync_status, last_sync_at ) values ( #{source.sourceCode}, #{source.name}, #{source.sourceType}, #{source.contentProfile}, #{source.status}, #{source.visibility}, #{source.defaultSyncMode}, #{source.configJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, #{source.metadataJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, #{source.latestManifestHash}, #{source.lastSyncRunId}, #{source.lastSyncStatus}, #{source.lastSyncAt} ) returning id
mapper.update: update knowledge_sources set source_code = #{source.sourceCode}, name = #{source.name}, source_type = #{source.sourceType}, content_profile = #{source.contentProfile}, status = #{source.status}, visibility = #{source.visibility}, default_sync_mode = #{source.defaultSyncMode}, config_json = #{source.configJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, metadata_json = #{source.metadataJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, latest_manifest_hash = #{source.latestManifestHash}, last_sync_run_id = #{source.lastSyncRunId}, last_sync_status = #{source.lastSyncStatus}, last_sync_at = #{source.lastSyncAt}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{source.id}
